parse.title: Umbral Glaive
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency = 
|similaritems = Edge of Night;Axiom Arc;Hubris;Voltaic Cyclosword;Youmuu's Ghostblade;The Collector;Serpent's Fang;Profane Hydra;Bastionbreaker
|background = 
|notes = 
* {{sbc|Blackout}} affects all types of {{tip|wards}} and {{tip|stealthed trap|stealthed traps}} (including {{cai|Jack in the Box|Shaco}}).
* The disable lingers for 2 seconds on wards and traps affected by {{sbc|Blackout}} after the user is no longer in range.
* {{sbc|Blackout}} will not trigger if the owner currently has a {{tip|Sweeper Drone}} active.
* {{sbc|Blackout}} will not activate on a ward that would be detected by {{ri|Sixth Sense}}, whenever both are available.

* {{sm2|Umbral Glaive passive SFX.ogg}} Passive SFX
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.01]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2800}} from {{g|2500}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|750}} from {{g|450}}.
* Attack damage increased to 60 from 55.
* Lethality increased to 18 from 15.
* Ability haste increased to 15 from 10.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive - Nightstalker:}} While out of vision of enemies for 1 second, and for 4 seconds after seen, your next basic attack against a champion deals {{as|50 {{as|(+ {{fd|1.5}} per 1 Lethality)}} '''bonus''' true damage}}.

;[[V25.07]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2500}} from {{g|2600}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|450}} from {{g|550}}.
* Attack damage increased to 55 from 50.
* Blackout cooldown increased to 90 seconds from 50.

;[[V14.19]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|550}} from {{g|500}}.
** Total cost unchanged.
* Ability haste reduced to 10 from 15.
* Bonus damage to wards is now part of a unique passive named Extinguish and is no longer part of Blackout.

;[[V14.1]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|500}} = {{g|2600}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|500}} = {{g|2300}}.
* Lethality increased to 15 from 13.

;[[V13.16]]
* Lethality increased to 13 from 10.

;[[V13.3]]
* Blackout cooldown increased to 50 seconds from 40.
* Blackout bonus damage for {{tip|ranged}} champions reduced to 1 from 2.
* {{sbc|Removed:}} Blackout no longer instantly kills traps.

;[[V12.21]]
* Updated icon.

;[[V12.13]]
* Now tracks the number of wards killed with the passive effect.

;[[V12.11]]
* Blackout cooldown increased to 40 seconds from 35.

;[[V12.7]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2300}} from {{g|2400}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|500}} from {{g|600}}.
* Blackout cooldown reduced to 35 seconds from 45.

;[[V11.18]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2400}} from {{g|2600}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|600}} from {{g|800}}.
* Lethality reduced to 10 from 12.

;[[V11.16]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Passive can no longer deal bonus damage to invulnerable wards (ones that are being {{si|Teleport|Teleported}} to).

;[[V11.2]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|800}} =  {{g|2600}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|2800}}.
* Attack damage reduced to 50 from 55.
* Description has been updated in the Collection tab.

;[[V10.24]]
* Updated icon.

;[[V10.23]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Caulfield's Warhammer}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 15 ability haste, 12 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Blackout:}} When spotted by enemy {{tip|ward|wards}} or {{tip|stealthed trap|traps}}, gain ''Blackout'' over a 400-unit radius for 8 seconds (45 second cooldown). You {{tip|disabled ward|disable}} surrounding wards, as well as {{tip|expose}} and {{tip|true sight|reveal}} stealthed wards and traps. The effects linger for 2 seconds after you walk away.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} Your basic attacks instantly kill {{tip|sight|revealed}} traps and deal triple damage to wards.
** Limited to 1 '''Umbral Glaive'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|2400}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 50 attack damage, 10% cooldown reduction.
** {{sbc|Unique:}} +12 lethality.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Blackout:}} When spotted by enemy {{tip|ward|wards}} or {{tip|stealthed trap|traps}}, gain ''Blackout'' over a 400-unit radius for 8 seconds (45 second cooldown). You {{tip|disabled ward|disable}} surrounding wards, as well as {{tip|expose}} and {{tip|true sight|reveal}} stealthed wards and traps. The effects linger for 2 seconds after you walk away.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} Your basic attacks instantly kill {{tip|sight|revealed}} traps and deal triple damage to wards.

;[[V10.21#October 14th Hotfix|10.21]] - October 14th Hotfix
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Fixed a bug where destroyed jungle plants would not respawn for the remainder of the game.

;[[V10.13]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Now properly deals extra damage to revealed traps.

;[[V9.23]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|2400}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 50 attack damage, 10% cooldown reduction.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive:}} 12 lethality.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Blackout:}} When spotted by an enemy ward or {{tip|stealthed trap|traps}}, gain ''Blackout'' over a 400-unit radius for 8 seconds (45 second cooldown). You {{tip|disabled ward|disable}} surrounding wards, as well as {{tip|expose|exposing}} ''stealthed'' wards and {{tip|stealthed trap|traps}}. The effects linger for 2 seconds after you walk away. Basic attacks instantly kill revealed traps and do triple damage to wards.
}}
